feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: S/4HANA Public cloud 的開窗可以隱藏不需要的公司代碼嗎?
entry.content:
因為目前傳票列印台灣沒有本地化，因此為了借用中國的範本我們啟用了國家別【CN】；
但啟用CN後系統會要求需要建立CN的Company code，我們也建立了，但對於用戶來說CN Company code是不存在的，因此想詢問是否有設定可以隱藏CN Company code，讓user在操作時不要看到？

再麻煩各位專家解答，謝謝。

entry.title: Exchange Rate Difference Line with Zero Amount Prevents Posting (Public Cloud)
entry.content:
When making a payment to a vendor using the same currency (TWD), SAP generates a Gain from exchange rate difference posting to G/L account 72510000, but both the debit and credit amounts are shown as zero.

In this case, the vendor invoice is linked to a down payment.

 

Because of this, I assume the posting to G/L account 72510000 should not occur and may not be necessary at all.

However, due to this G/L line item, I’m unable to complete the posting.

Has anyone else encountered the same issue or found a solution?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Historical balances
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

can anyone here help:

Can migrated historical data (historical balance) be subsequently cancelled in the test system (SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud).
The system only generates a technical document that cannot be cancelled. No real document is generated.

Is there another way to delete migrated data?

Thank you in advance.
Best regards
N.S.

entry.title: Requirement class for sales documents (Details)
entry.content: Dear all, where can i find details to the different Requirements class (e.g. Calc. Variant PPC4 for Order calculation)

entry.title: Unable to Create/Post STO Purchase order Using BO/API
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We're trying to post a STO Purchase Order using Standard API & same we try with business object, But we get a error of (MessageClass='APPL_MM_PUR_PO',MessageNumber='065'  Short Text = Use a supported purchase order item category for item &. See long text.) 

please help with this to find out the way to resolve this.

 

Link - https://my418769-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata4/sap/api_purchaseorder_2/srvd_a2x/sap/purchaseorder/0001/PurchaseOrder

Payload - 
{
    "CompanyCode": "1000",
    "PurchaseOrderType": "UD",
    "Supplier": "1004",
    "PurchasingOrganization": "1000",
    "PurchasingGroup": "003",
    "_PurchaseOrderItem": [
        {
            "Plant": "1007",
            "OrderQuantity": 7,
            "NetPriceAmount": 0,
            "NetPriceQuantity": 1,
            "PurchaseOrderItemCategory": "7",
            "TaxCode": "2E",
            "DocumentCurrency" : "",
            "OrderPriceUnit" : "",
            "PurchaseOrderQuantityUnit" : " "
           
        }
    ]
}

entry.title: Purchase Order forms
entry.content:
Hello Experts ,

 

Is it possible to add condition record lines in purchase order form in line items details 

eg. If we purchase metals like silver copper prices  in condition record can we make display of it in po print for supplier to know how many meters and what is the market price as of ordering and then net amount to be dispalyed and leads highly appreciated .

expected these prices to be displayed in Purchase order .

entry.title: CUSTOM LOGIC FOR INCOTERMS
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

we have a custom logic for a company code already that triggers incoterms in PO line items .

However, we wanted to have same functionality for another company code to trigger in PO line item level.

Can we extend same custom logic for another company code or we need to create new logic for new company 

if we can extend, how can we achieve it .

entry.title: Timestamp in SRT_MONI Reflecting When Message Was First Sent Outbound
entry.content:
Good afternoon,

I'm working with data in SRT_MONI and struggling to understand what is the exact field that identifies the moment in which the message is sent out bound.

What is the field that is giving me this information?
Or is there a way I can have that time by adding performance data to 

CREATED_TS

?

entry.title: Setting up SESSION_TIMEOUT_STOP_DATA_REFRESH
entry.content:
Hello Support,

 

We are facing an issue with the internal timeout setting for SESSION_TIMEOUT_STOP_DATA_REFRESH, which is currently set to 15 minutes. We would like to extend this timeout to 60 minutes.

 

How can we do this?

 

Kind regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to automate clearing status of Bank Items when posting manual bank statements?
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I would like to know how to automate the clearing status of Bank items when posting manually created bank statements in the SAP S4Hana public cloud system?

I plan to use only the manual transactions, F005 (Other Disbursements) and F006 (Other Receipts) regardless of the type of payment used (eg., check, cash, transfer). Also, will be using the Assignment field as the reference for auto-clearing. Is my procedure okay? 

I don't know how to set the processing rules for bank statements wherein, upon posting of the bank statement, the system will automatically create a journal entry to close the clearing account and change its status to cleared. 

My initial set up in the system for automated processing rule is, 

this setup only post a journal entry and still an open item, need to manually clear. What I need is to automate the clearing process given the Amount and the reference in the Assignment field for auto-clearing. 

Currently using the SAP S4hana cloud, Public version 2502 system.

Thank You

Best regards,

Meri

entry.title: COGS split into fixed and variable in Public Cloud
entry.content: As per business requirement we need to split activity cost as fixed and variable in margin analysis, but in configuration there is no option to select fixed and variable. Is this option available in SAP public cloud?

entry.title: Inter company costing in Public Cloud
entry.content: As per current setup we have 2 manufacturing company codes and 1 selling company code, once the material is produced the same will be transferred to selling company. In selling company we are valuating materials with standard cost and we need to read the standard costing from manufacturing company. How can we setup (cross company code costing) this scenario in the system?

entry.title: Cost allocation on basis of production quantity in SAP Public cloud
entry.content:
Client has a requirement to allocate costs based on quantity produced in the system. Are there any options to enable this? 

In addition, would like to know if there are any enhancement capabilities for the cost allocation process in SAP public cloud?

entry.title: NOT ABLE TO POST PO FOR NLAG MATERIALS
entry.content:
Hello Experts ,

 

kindly suggest me on this not able to post a po for NLAG material now, but usually able to post previously ..

this is the error which showed .

 

Regards,

zareena

entry.title: Is there any API in sap public cloud to read the full Journal Entry XML data?
entry.content:
Hi,

I need to read existing JE XML data that were created manually by users, in order to customize an external system to send customized JE to SAP Public Cloud version.

However in SAP Business Accelerator Hub portal, I only find APIs that allow me to read JE item data and not the full JE document. These are some API that I tested and only allow me to read JE item data:

API_OPLACCTGDOCITEMCUBE_SRV
API_OPLACCTGDOCITEMCUBE_SRV
API_GLACCOUNTLINEITEM

Isn't there any API to read a specific JE XML full structure?

I was wondering if I could use other APIs to update existing JE like JOURNALENTRYBULKCHANGEREQUEST and then I could get the full JE XML in the response...

Please help!

Thanks

entry.title: Unable to pass Sale Order discount condition value to PO discount condition value
entry.content:
Even after clicking on 'update' in PO conditions tab for updating the custom condition type for discount you are only getting the value from Sales orders condition record and not the changed value in sales order's Respective condition type.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Sales Pricing Condition Discount applied only on a specific surcharge
entry.content:
Hello, I am trying to set up a complicated discount condition in my pricing procedure and I am having issues. The request is: when the gross value of the order reaches XXX EUR, then there should be a 100% discount applied on specifically condition ZFRC.

For this discount I have set up discount ZFRD and created a scale for it, in which it is indicated that after XXX EUR is reached, 100% discount is applied with ZFRD. I have assigned alt condition base 5 to ZFRD, which holds the gross value or the order.

The problem is that this 100% discount gets applied to the whole order, not just to ZFRC.

In this example the order value pre-freight is 20,000, while the freight is 100. The result I am looking for is that the condition value for ZFRD is -100 and the end result in Net Value 2 is 20,000.

I have also tried assigning alt condition base 19 to ZFRD, so that it looks at the freight cost stored in KZWI4, but in that case the condition stops taking into account the gross value of the order, so it doesn't work.

Please assist.

entry.title: Needed report - on G/L accounts that have been renamed -
entry.content:
Needed report - on G/L accounts that have been renamed -


Hi all,

Can anyone help?

Is there an app that can be used to create a report showing where G/L accounts have been renamed?

The customer needs a list with the old and new names. In the ‘Manage G/L account master data’ app and also in the ‘Manage chart of accounts’ app, there is no field that can be displayed as a filter. You can only check the G/L accounts individually in the Manage G/L account master data app.

Thank you in advance.

Best regards
N.S.

entry.title: eInvoice Romania - Configuring INVOICE_TYPE_CODE_SD for Sales in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
eInvoice Romania - how to map INVOICE_TYPE_CODE_SD to external values?

entry.title: Need to get memo text from Interest Rate Instrument
entry.content:
We need to retrieve the memo text values from the Interest Rate Instrument. See attached.

I found that standard app is using the function module READ_TEXT but this object not a released api.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
